prInfo.title: [GRT-6878] - feat: 원데이 면접 api 추가
prInfo.body:
### 개요
<!-- Jira 티켓 링크 포함 -->

* jira: https://doodlin.atlassian.net/browse/GRT-6878

### 작업 내용
<!-- no-jira 작업의 경우 내용 필수 -->
<!-- Jira 본문에 내용이 있다면 간략하게 작성 -->

* greeting-ats-server로부터 실험실 기능을 조회하여 지원자 상세 API 권한을 우회합니다.

### 체크리스트
<!-- 필요에 따라 항목 추가/수정/삭제 -->
- [x] 빌드 확인
- [x] 테스트 통과



### 연관된 backend application
<!-- 해당 PR 내용에 영향받는 backend application -->

https://github.com/doodlincorp/greeting-new-back/pull/4390

### 추가 유의사항
<!-- 리뷰어나 배포 시 반드시 알아야 할 사항 -->
prInfo.author: biuea3866

findings.description: API 변경이 2개 연관 레포에 영향 가능: greeting-new-back, greeting_payment-server

crossRepoImpacts.description: API 변경 → greeting-new-back의 FeignClient/API 호출 확인 필요
API 변경 → greeting_payment-server의 FeignClient/API 호출 확인 필요

P3: API 변경이 2개 연관 레포에 영향 가능: greeting-new-back, greeting_payment-server

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+package doodlin.greeting.aggregator.adaptor.opening
+
+import doodlin.greeting.aggregator.business.application.greeting.opening.payload.WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction
+import doodlin.greeting.aggregator.business.application.greeting.opening.port.out.WorkspaceLabQueryOutputPort
+import org.springframework.stereotype.Component
+
+@Component
+internal class WorkspaceLabAdaptor(
+    private val openingNewBackFeignClient: OpeningNewBackFeignClient
+): WorkspaceLabQueryOutputPort {
+    override fun isEnabledOn(workspaceId: Int, workspaceLaboratoryFunction: WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction): Boolean {
+        return openingNewBackFeignClient.getWorkspaceLabFunctions(workspaceId)
+            .mapNotNull { it.laboratoryFunction }
+            .contains(workspaceLaboratoryFunction)
+    }
+}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+package doodlin.greeting.aggregator.adaptor.opening.payload.response
+
+import com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonParser
+import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.DeserializationContext
+import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.annotation.JsonDeserialize
+import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.deser.std.StdDeserializer
+import doodlin.greeting.aggregator.business.application.greeting.opening.payload.WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction
+
+data class GetWorkspaceLabFunction(
+    val workspaceLaboratoryId: Long,
+    val workspaceId: Int,
+    @field:JsonDeserialize(using = WorkspaceLaboratoryFunctionDeserializer::class)
+    val laboratoryFunction: WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction?
+)
+
+private class WorkspaceLaboratoryFunctionDeserializer : StdDeserializer<WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction?>(WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction::class.java) {
+    override fun deserialize(p: JsonParser, ctxt: DeserializationContext): WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction? =
+        runCatching { WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction.valueOf(p.valueAsString) }.getOrNull()
+}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,65 @@
+package doodlin.greeting.aggregator.adaptor.opening
+
+import doodlin.greeting.aggregator.adaptor.opening.payload.response.GetWorkspaceLabFunction
+import doodlin.greeting.aggregator.business.application.greeting.opening.payload.WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction
+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertFalse
+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertTrue
+import org.junit.jupiter.api.DisplayName
+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test
+import org.mockito.kotlin.mock
+import org.mockito.kotlin.whenever
+
+@DisplayName("WorkspaceLabAdaptor")
+class WorkspaceLabAdaptorTest {
+
+    private val openingNewBackFeignClient = mock<OpeningNewBackFeignClient>()
+    private val adaptor = WorkspaceLabAdaptor(openingNewBackFeignClient)
+
+    @Test
+    @DisplayName("활성화된 기능이 포함되어 있으면 true를 반환한다")
+    fun `returns true when the function is enabled`() {
+        whenever(openingNewBackFeignClient.getWorkspaceLabFunctions(1)).thenReturn(
+            listOf(labFunction(WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction.AI_SCREENING))
+        )
+
+        assertTrue(adaptor.isEnabledOn(1, WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction.AI_SCREENING))
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    @DisplayName("활성화된 기능이 포함되어 있지 않으면 false를 반환한다")
+    fun `returns false when the function is not enabled`() {
+        whenever(openingNewBackFeignClient.getWorkspaceLabFunctions(1)).thenReturn(
+            listOf(labFunction(WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction.AI_SCREENING))
+        )
+
+        assertFalse(adaptor.isEnabledOn(1, WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction.OFFER_LETTER))
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    @DisplayName("알 수 없는 enum 값이 포함되어 있어도 에러 없이 해당 값을 무시한다")
+    fun `ignores unknown enum values without throwing an error`() {
+        whenever(openingNewBackFeignClient.getWorkspaceLabFunctions(1)).thenReturn(
+            listOf(
+                labFunction(null),
+                labFunction(WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction.AI_SCREENING),
+            )
+        )
+
+        assertTrue(adaptor.isEnabledOn(1, WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction.AI_SCREENING))
+        assertFalse(adaptor.isEnabledOn(1, WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction.OFFER_LETTER))
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    @DisplayName("활성화된 기능 목록이 비어 있으면 false를 반환한다")
+    fun `returns false when the list is empty`() {
+        whenever(openingNewBackFeignClient.getWorkspaceLabFunctions(1)).thenReturn(emptyList())
+
+        assertFalse(adaptor.isEnabledOn(1, WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction.AI_SCREENING))
+    }
+
+    private fun labFunction(function: WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction?) = GetWorkspaceLabFunction(
+        workspaceLaboratoryId = 1L,
+        workspaceId = 1,
+        laboratoryFunction = function,
+    )
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+package doodlin.greeting.aggregator.adaptor.opening.payload.response
+
+import com.fasterxml.jackson.module.kotlin.jacksonObjectMapper
+import com.fasterxml.jackson.module.kotlin.readValue
+import doodlin.greeting.aggregator.business.application.greeting.opening.payload.WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction
+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals
+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertNull
+import org.junit.jupiter.api.DisplayName
+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test
+
+@DisplayName("GetWorkspaceLabFunction")
+class GetWorkspaceLabFunctionTest {
+    private val objectMapper = jacksonObjectMapper()
+
+    @Test
+    @DisplayName("정상적인 enum 값이 들어오면 올바르게 역직렬화한다")
+    fun `deserializes valid enum value`() {
+        val json = """
+            {
+                "workspaceLaboratoryId": 1,
+                "workspaceId": 123,
+                "laboratoryFunction": "AI_SCREENING"
+            }
+        """.trimIndent()
+
+        val result = objectMapper.readValue<GetWorkspaceLabFunction>(json)
+
+        assertEquals(WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction.AI_SCREENING, result.laboratoryFunction)
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    @DisplayName("알 수 없는 enum 값이 들어오면 null로 역직렬화한다")
+    fun `deserializes unknown enum value to null`() {
+        val json = """
+            {
+                "workspaceLaboratoryId": 1,
+                "workspaceId": 123,
+                "laboratoryFunction": "UNKNOWN_FUNCTION"
+            }
+        """.trimIndent()
+
+        val result = objectMapper.readValue<GetWorkspaceLabFunction>(json)
+
+        assertNull(result.laboratoryFunction)
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    @DisplayName("laboratoryFunction이 null이면 null로 역직렬화한다")
+    fun `deserializes null laboratoryFunction`() {
+        val json = """
+            {
+                "workspaceLaboratoryId": 1,
+                "workspaceId": 123,
+                "laboratoryFunction": null
+            }
+        """.trimIndent()
+
+        val result = objectMapper.readValue<GetWorkspaceLabFunction>(json)
+
+        assertNull(result.laboratoryFunction)
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    @DisplayName("laboratoryFunction 필드가 없으면 null로 역직렬화한다")
+    fun `deserializes missing laboratoryFunction`() {
+        val json = """
+            {
+                "workspaceLaboratoryId": 1,
+                "workspaceId": 123
+            }
+        """.trimIndent()
+
+        val result = objectMapper.readValue<GetWorkspaceLabFunction>(json)
+
+        assertNull(result.laboratoryFunction)
+    }
+}

+package doodlin.greeting.aggregator.business.application.greeting.opening.payload
+

+    AI_RESUME_PARSING,
+    APPLICANT_BULK,
+    NOT_AVAILABLE_PDF_HEADER,
+    OFFER_LETTER,
+    JOB_POSITION,
+    INTERVIEWER_VIEW,
+    PREVENT_APPLICANT_MEMO_FILE_UPLOAD,
+    SOFTEER,
+    ANALYTICS_IGNORE_PLAN_CONSTRAINT,
+    DISABLED_WANTED,
+    PROGRAMMERS_OTT,
+    AI_SCREENING,
+    FAKE_ONE_DAY_INTERVIEW
+}

@@ -1250,6 +1258,50 @@ internal class ApplicantController(
         return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(result))
     }
 
+    @GetMapping(
+        value = ["/candidates/detail/one-day-interview"],
+        headers = ["${Headers.X_API_VERSION}=1.0"],
+        produces = [MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE]
+    )
+    @Operation(summary = "지원자 상세 정보 조회 - 원데이 면접용", description = "지원자의 상세 정보를 여러 API에서 조회하여 통합합니다.")
+    fun getCandidateDetailForOneDayInterview(
+        @RequestHeader(name = Headers.X_GREETING_USER_ID, required = true) userId: Long,
+        @RequestHeader(name = Headers.X_GREETING_OPENING_ID, required = true) openingId: Long,
+        @RequestHeader(name = Headers.X_GREETING_WORKSPACE_ID, required = true) workspaceId: Long,
+        @RequestHeader(name = Headers.X_GREETING_APPLICANT_ID, required = true) applicantId: Long,
+    ): ResponseEntity<ApiResponse<GetCandidateDetailOutput>> {
+        val isEnabledOnOneDayInterview = workspaceLaboratoryUseCase.isEnabledOn(workspaceId.toInt(), WorkspaceLaboratoryFunction.FAKE_ONE_DAY_INTERVIEW)
+
+        if (isEnabledOnOneDayInterview.not()) {
+            with(getServletRequestAttributes()) {
+                authorizationQueryUseCase.checkPermission(
+                    this.getActor(Actor.Types.GREETING_USER),
+                    this.getTenant(Tenant.Types.WORKSPACE),
+                    this.getContext(Context.Types.APPLICANT).toResource(),
+                    Permission.READ_APPLICANT,
+                )
+            }
+        } else {
+            with(getServletRequestAttributes()) {
+                authorizationQueryUseCase.checkPermission(
+                    this.getActor(Actor.Types.GREETING_USER),
+                    this.getTenant(Tenant.Types.WORKSPACE),
+                    this.getContext(Context.Types.OPENING).toResource(),
+                    Permission.READ_OPENING,
+                )
+            }
+        }
+
+        val result = getCandidateDetailUseCase.getCandidateDetail(
+            workspaceId = workspaceId,
+            userId = userId,
+            applicantId = applicantId,
+            openingId = openingId
+        )
+
+        return ResponseEntity.ok(ApiResponse.success(result))
+    }
+

reviewBody:
## PR Review: [GRT-6878] - feat: 원데이 면접 api 추가

**유형**: feature | **크기**: L (+298 -0) | **파일**: 14

**심각도**: P3: 1

### P3 (1건)
- API 변경이 2개 연관 레포에 영향 가능: greeting-new-back, greeting_payment-server

### Cross-Repo
- **greeting-new-back**: API 변경 → greeting-new-back의 FeignClient/API 호출 확인 필요
- **greeting_payment-server**: API 변경 → greeting_payment-server의 FeignClient/API 호출 확인 필요
